title: PolicyConfig
description: Schema for scheduling-policy configuration used by the simulator and recommender.

policy_id.description: Unique identifier for this policy configuration.

runtime_guard_k.description: Multiplier applied to predicted runtime for guard-rail checks (e.g. 0.5 = P50 estimate).

strict_uncertainty_mode.description: When true, the policy refuses to schedule jobs whose runtime uncertainty exceeds the guard threshold.

starvation_wait_cap_sec.description: Maximum wall-clock seconds a job may wait before anti-starvation promotion kicks in.

fairness_dev_delta_max.description: Maximum tolerated deviation in per-user fairness share.

jain_delta_max.description: Maximum drop in Jain fairness index relative to the FCFS baseline.

max_candidates.description: Maximum number of candidate jobs to evaluate for backfill per scheduling cycle.

quantile.description: Runtime quantile to use when estimating job duration for backfill decisions.

grace_period_sec.description: Minimum run-time in seconds before a job becomes eligible for preemption.
